coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
采采芣苢，薄言采之，采采芣苢，薄言有之。
采采芣苢，薄言掇之，采采芣苢，薄言捋之。
采采芣苢，薄言袺之，采采芣苢，薄言襭之。
translation_text:
1 We gather and gather the plantains;
Now we may gather them.
We gather and gather the plantains;
Now we have got them.

1 In the south rise the trees without branches,
Affording no shelter.
By the Han are girls rambling about,
But it is vain to solicit them.
